name: SwipeCircle Marketing
description: Public marketing landing page for SwipeCircle — a mobile-first swipe-based social rating community. Photo-first hero with 'Rate. Connect. Vibe.' tagline, dual sign-up/log-in CTAs plus a demo mode entry, feature highlights showing the swipe loop, social proof, and a final conversion CTA. Optimized for casual consumer first-impressions.

pages.description: Public splash and conversion landing for SwipeCircle.
directives: Hero tagline: 'Rate. Connect. Vibe.' — three-word punch, positioned over a soft coral-to-peach gradient background
Hero subhead: warm, inviting, ~12-18 words — describe the swipe-and-connect promise without being thirsty

Auth CTA section provides TWO equal-weight buttons: 'Sign Up' (primary coral pill) and 'Log In' (secondary white-bordered pill), plus a small ghost link below: 'Try Demo Mode' for instant exploration without signup
Features section highlights the four pillars: Swipe (heart icon), Match (sparkle icon), Chat (message icon), Vibe (smile icon) — short blurb per pillar, soft peach card backgrounds
How-it-works walks through the 3-step loop: 1) Build your profile, 2) Swipe through your circle, 3) Chat with matches — illustrated by simple line-art or photo collages
Testimonials use real-feeling first-name + age tags (no LinkedIn-style headshots) — '— Maya, 27', '— Jordan, 32' — feels like reading text messages from friends
Final CTA banner is coral-fill with white text + arrow icon: 'Find your circle today →'
Footer remains warm: about, privacy, terms, contact — no enterprise compliance noise

page_briefs.home: A warm, photo-first marketing splash that feels more like a welcome than a sales pitch. Top-nav-footer shell with brand logo (small, friendly), thin nav with 'About / How It Works / Log In', and a coral 'Sign Up' pill button at the right. Hero is centered (mobile-first responsive), with a large 'Rate. Connect. Vibe.' display headline in the SwipeCircle display font, a single-sentence subhead, and two side-by-side pill CTAs (Sign Up primary coral / Log In white-bordered) plus a small 'Try Demo Mode' ghost link beneath. The hero background is a soft coral-to-peach gradient with a subtle decorative swipe-card mockup floating on the right (or below on mobile). Below the hero, a four-pillar features grid (Swipe / Match / Chat / Vibe) with soft peach card backgrounds and minimal Lucide icons. The how-it-works section walks through three steps with illustrated cards. Testimonials feel like text messages — short quotes attributed to first names + ages. The closing CTA banner is full-width coral with a final invitation. Voice throughout: playful, warm, encouraging — never desperate, never pushy. Avoid 'Submit' / 'Click here' / 'Buy now' verbs.

directives: Primary buttons fill coral; secondary buttons use white border + transparent fill
Demo Mode link sets a localStorage flag and navigates to /discover with mock data — no actual auth
Hero must work on mobile portrait — stack hero text + CTAs vertically, swipe-card mockup moves below on narrow viewports
Page is fully accessible: heading hierarchy h1→h2→h3, all CTAs keyboard-focusable with visible focus rings, alt text on all imagery

shells.top-nav-footer: Sticky top nav (logo left, primary nav center, auth CTAs right) over a body that scrolls through hero + sections + footer.

personality: Photo-first marketing splash that feels more like a friendly welcome than a sales pitch. Pill-shaped CTAs, coral primaries with violet hover, soft peach gradient backgrounds. Tagline 'Rate. Connect. Vibe.' delivered in a warm display font over a soft photo-quality gradient. Testimonials read like text messages from friends, not LinkedIn endorsements. Buttons feel tactile with bouncy spring transitions. Hinge-meets-Dribbble vibe — never thirsty, never enterprise.
